profile_summary: Leisure traveler (mid budget) prioritizing accessibility, central location.

recommendations.justification: The Grand Court, Mexico City ranks #1 for this traveler on accessibility (+0.82), central location (+0.92), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Great bars and clubs right around the corner, perfect for a night out."

supporting_evidence.quote: Great bars and clubs right around the corner, perfect for a night out.
Excellent accessibility — wide doorways, roll-in shower, and helpful staff.
Fully step-free with a spacious, well-designed accessible room.
